zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Plessington於1310年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾維莫斯利時，她的父親Robert Plessington36歲，母親Katherine Wymersley26歲。她於1328年與Sir Richard Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Plessington于1310年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾維莫斯利时，她的父亲Robert Plessington36岁，母亲Katherine Wymersley26岁。她于1328年与Sir Richard Radcliffe在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plessington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (now most common in Fermanagh, Northern Ireland): habitational name from Pleasington in Blackburn (Lancashire), named with the Old English personal name Plēsa + tūn ‘estate, farmstead’, and altered to Blessington possibly under the influence of Blessington, Wicklow. The name of Blessington in Wicklow, Ireland, founded in 1669, is based on an English mistranslation of the Irish name Baile Coimín ‘town of Coimín’, where the surname Ó Coimín (English Comyn) was mistaken for the Irish word comaoin ‘favour, obligation, blessing’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Plessington was born in 1310, in Wymersley, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Robert Plessington, was 36 and her mother, Katherine Wymersley, was 26. She married Sir Richard Radcliffe in 1328, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1369, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Plessington est née en 1310, à Wymersley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Plessington, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wymersley, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Radcliffe en 1328, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1369, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Plessington 1310 in Wymersley, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Plessington 36 und ihre Mutter Katherine Wymersley 26. Sie hat 1328 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1369 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Plessington è nata il nel 1310 nel Wymersley, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Robert Plessington, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Katherine Wymersley, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Radcliffe nel 1328, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1369, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Plessingtonが1310年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウイメルスリーで生まれた時，父Robert Plessingtonは36歳，母Katherine Wymersleyは26歳であった。1328年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフでSir Richard Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Plessington(이)가 1310년 영국 노르섬프토실르 윈이머슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Plessington(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Wymersley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 Sir Richard Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Plessington nasceu em 1310, em Wymersley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Plessington, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Wymersley, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Radcliffe em 1328, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1369, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Plessington родилась в 1310 г. в местности вимирсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Plessington было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wymersley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Radcliffe в 1328 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1369 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Plessington nació en 1310, en Wymersley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Plessington, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Katherine Wymersley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Radcliffe en 1328, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1369, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
